verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He is here, hallelujah! He is here, Amen! He is here, Holy, Holy! I will bless His holy name; He is here, listen closely, Hear Him calling out your name, He is here, you can touch Him, You will never be the same.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In the presence of Jehovah God Almighty, Prince of Peace Troubles vanish, hearts are mended In the presence of The King
